items.line_en: Join kids' heart family!

coach.say: Join kids' heart family!
coach.hint: Chunk it: Join kids' heart family!

items.line_en: Hi, Phil! Hi, Tofu!

coach.say: Hi, Phil! Hi, Tofu!
coach.hint: Chunk it: Hi, / Phil! / Hi, / Tofu!

items.line_en: Hello, Tia!

coach.say: Hello, Tia!
coach.hint: Chunk it: Hello, / Tia!

items.line_en: Hello, Phil! Tofu!

coach.say: Hello, Phil! Tofu!
coach.hint: Chunk it: Hello, / Phil! / Tofu!

items.line_en: Why don't you take full to your room and play?

coach.say: Why don't you take full to your room and play?
coach.hint: Chunk it: Why don't you take full to your room and / play?

items.line_en: I bring you some tasty snacks in a while!

coach.say: I bring you some tasty snacks in a while!
coach.hint: Chunk it: I bring you some tasty snacks in a while / !

items.line_en: Yes, Phil! Let's go to my room and play!

coach.say: Yes, Phil! Let's go to my room and play!
coach.hint: Chunk it: Yes, / Phil! / Let's go to my room and play!

items.line_en: Whoa, Tofu! You've got so many toys! Can we play?

coach.say: Whoa, Tofu! You've got so many toys! Can we play?
coach.hint: Chunk it: Whoa, / Tofu! / You've got so many toys! / Can we play?

items.line_en: Ah, yes! I thought we'll go out and play football instead!

coach.say: Ah, yes! I thought we'll go out and play football instead!
coach.hint: Chunk it: Ah, / yes! / I thought we'll go out and play football instead!

items.line_en: We can play football too!

coach.say: We can play football too!
coach.hint: Chunk it: We can play football too!

items.line_en: I just want to play with your toys for a while!

coach.say: I just want to play with your toys for a while!
coach.hint: Chunk it: I just want to play with your toys for a while / !

items.line_en: Okay! You can play with my toys!

coach.say: Okay! You can play with my toys!
coach.hint: Chunk it: Okay! / You can play with my toys!

items.line_en: Yay! Look at the car!

coach.say: Yay! Look at the car!
coach.hint: Chunk it: Yay! / Look at the car!

items.line_en: It's so beautiful! Is it a remote controlled car?

coach.say: It's so beautiful! Is it a remote controlled car?
coach.hint: Chunk it: It's so beautiful! / Is it a remote controlled car?

items.line_en: Yes! It's a remote controlled car!

coach.say: Yes! It's a remote controlled car!
coach.hint: Chunk it: Yes! / It's a remote controlled car!

items.line_en: My grandma gave it to me on my birthday!

coach.say: My grandma gave it to me on my birthday!
coach.hint: Chunk it: My grandma gave it to me on my birthday!

items.line_en: Can I play with it? Oh no!

coach.say: Can I play with it? Oh no!
coach.hint: Chunk it: Can I play with it? / Oh no!

items.line_en: It doesn't have a battery! Don't touch it!

coach.say: It doesn't have a battery! Don't touch it!
coach.hint: Chunk it: It doesn't have a battery! / Don't touch it!

items.line_en: Okay! But Tofu, this is not fair! I will not talk to you!

coach.say: Okay! But Tofu, this is not fair! I will not talk to you!
coach.hint: Chunk it: Okay! / But Tofu, / this is not fair! / I will not talk to you!

items.line_en: Why aren't you not letting me play with your toys?

coach.say: Why aren't you not letting me play with your toys?
coach.hint: Chunk it: Why aren't you not letting me play with your toys?

items.line_en: You are my friend! Phil, please!

coach.say: You are my friend! Phil, please!
coach.hint: Chunk it: You are my friend! / Phil, / please!

items.line_en: Don't touch my toys! I don't like sharing my toys!

coach.say: Don't touch my toys! I don't like sharing my toys!
coach.hint: Chunk it: Don't touch my toys! / I don't like sharing my toys!

items.line_en: Okay Tofu, so I'm going home! This is not what friends do!

coach.say: Okay Tofu, so I'm going home! This is not what friends do!
coach.hint: Chunk it: Okay Tofu, / so I'm going home! / This is not what friends do!

items.line_en: My mother told me, good friends always share!

coach.say: My mother told me, good friends always share!
coach.hint: Chunk it: My mother told me, / good friends always share!

items.line_en: You are not a good friend! Bye Tofu!

coach.say: You are not a good friend! Bye Tofu!
coach.hint: Chunk it: You are not a good friend! / Bye Tofu!

items.line_en: Bye, Phil!

coach.say: Bye, Phil!
coach.hint: Chunk it: Bye, / Phil!

items.line_en: Wait, Phil! Don't be upset!

coach.say: Wait, Phil! Don't be upset!
coach.hint: Chunk it: Wait, / Phil! / Don't be upset!

items.line_en: I will talk to Tofu! He is a very good boy!

coach.say: I will talk to Tofu! He is a very good boy!
coach.hint: Chunk it: I will talk to Tofu! / He is a very good boy!

items.line_en: Okay Tofu, say sorry to Phil and let him play with your toys!

coach.say: Okay Tofu, say sorry to Phil and let him play with your toys!
coach.hint: Chunk it: Okay Tofu, / say sorry to Phil and let him play with your toys!

items.line_en: But Tofu, these are my toys! He should play with his own toys!

coach.say: But Tofu, these are my toys! He should play with his own toys!
coach.hint: Chunk it: But Tofu, / these are my toys! / He should play with his own toys!

items.line_en: Tofu, do you remember when you went to Phil's birthday party?

coach.say: Tofu, do you remember when you went to Phil's birthday party?
coach.hint: Chunk it: Tofu, / do you remember when you went to Phil's birthday party?

items.line_en: He let all of his friends play with his new toys!

coach.say: He let all of his friends play with his new toys!
coach.hint: Chunk it: He let all of his friends play with his new toys!

items.line_en: You played with his toys too! And Phil was so happy sharing his toys with everyone!

coach.say: You played with his toys too! And Phil was so happy sharing his toys with everyone!
coach.hint: Chunk it: You played with his toys too! / And Phil was so happy sharing his toys with everyone!

items.line_en: Yes, I remember! Tofu, sharing is not just about giving back when someone gives you!

coach.say: Yes, I remember! Tofu, sharing is not just about giving back when someone gives you!
coach.hint: Chunk it: Yes, / I remember! / Tofu, / sharing is not just about giving back when someone gives you!

items.line_en: It's about sharing to show that you care for them! No matter what!

coach.say: It's about sharing to show that you care for them! No matter what!
coach.hint: Chunk it: It's about sharing to show that you care for them! / No matter what!

items.line_en: You should always be kind to everybody!

coach.say: You should always be kind to everybody!
coach.hint: Chunk it: You should always be kind to everybody!

items.line_en: You are right, dear! I'm sorry, Phil! I realize my mistake!

coach.say: You are right, dear! I'm sorry, Phil! I realize my mistake!
coach.hint: Chunk it: You are right, dear! / I'm sorry, Phil! I realize my mistake!

items.line_en: You can play with my toys!

coach.say: You can play with my toys!
coach.hint: Chunk it: You can play with my toys!

items.line_en: Really? Thank you so much Tofu!

coach.say: Really? Thank you so much Tofu!
coach.hint: Chunk it: Really? / Thank you so much Tofu!

items.line_en: Thank you, Tia! You're welcome, Phil!

coach.say: Thank you, Tia! You're welcome, Phil!
coach.hint: Chunk it: Thank you, / Tia! / You're welcome, / Phil!
